scripts.build:native: node-gyp configure --directory native && node-gyp build --directory native
scripts.build:native:electron: node-gyp configure --directory native --target=$(node -p "require('./node_modules/electron/package.json').version") --arch=arm64 --dist-url=https://electronjs.org/headers/dist && node-gyp build --directory native
scripts.start: npm run setup && npm run build:native && npm run build:renderer && electron .
scripts.dev: npm run setup && npm run build:native && concurrently "vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=true electron ."
scripts.build: npm run setup && npm run build:native:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:mac: npm run setup && npm run build:native:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:win: npm run setup && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:all: npm run setup && npm run build:native:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac --win --config electron-builder.config.js
